name: 矛盾与张力
description: 表达发现之间的不一致、理论张力、复杂性与反预期结果

expressions.note: 最直接的学术写法，适合指出发现与理论不符
expressions.example: The result is inconsistent with standard human capital models.

expressions.note: 语气更含蓄，强调解释上不顺畅而非完全否定
expressions.example: These patterns sit uneasily with a simple modernization account.

expressions.note: 强调方向相反，适合反驳预期或主流发现
expressions.example: The evidence runs counter to the assimilation hypothesis.

expressions.note: 强调偏离既有模式，语气比 contradict 温和
expressions.example: The cohort pattern departs from earlier evidence in Europe.

expressions.note: 直接指向某一观点，适合文献综述后的推进
expressions.example: Our findings challenge the view that marriage universally stabilizes employment.

expressions.note: 强调使某说法变得可疑，语气比 disprove 更谨慎
expressions.example: The results call into question the assumed neutrality of credentials.

expressions.note: 更强调证据层面的怀疑，适合讨论稳健性或替代理论
expressions.example: This pattern casts doubt on a purely economic explanation.

expressions.note: 语气较强，适合已有证据明显削弱某主张时
expressions.example: The subgroup results undermine the claim that the policy is gender-neutral.

expressions.note: 最清楚的让步结构，适合正式写作中承认限制
expressions.example: Although the sample is small, the pattern is remarkably consistent.

expressions.note: 比 although 更流畅，适合平衡两个并存事实
expressions.example: While women gained credentials, occupational segregation persisted.

expressions.en: To be sure, X; however, Y
expressions.note: 先承认对方观点再推进自己的论点，论辩感更强
expressions.example: To be sure, wages rose; however, inequality also widened.

expressions.note: 高度书面，适合强调某限制并未改变核心结论
expressions.example: Notwithstanding regional variation, the overall pattern remains clear.

expressions.note: 标准结果报告写法，直接标明与预期相反
expressions.example: Contrary to expectations, the association is stronger among men.

expressions.note: 更明确指向作者预期，适合结果解释段
expressions.example: Against our expectations, parental income predicts migration less strongly.

expressions.note: 最简洁，但解释力度弱，适合句内轻量标记
expressions.example: The coefficient unexpectedly turns negative in the full model.

expressions.en: in a pattern not anticipated by prior theory
expressions.note: 突出理论没有预见，适合引出讨论贡献
expressions.example: Women delayed retirement in a pattern not anticipated by prior theory.

expressions.en: a tension between X and Y
expressions.note: 最常用名词结构，适合概念或制度之间的拉扯
expressions.example: The reform reveals a tension between efficiency and equity.

expressions.note: 更形象，强调两个力量方向相反
expressions.example: Market incentives and family obligations pull in opposite directions.

expressions.note: 适合把一个发现放入理论关系中讨论
expressions.example: The gender-neutral framing is in tension with unequal caregiving demands.

expressions.en: a trade-off between X and Y
expressions.note: 强调选择一方会牺牲另一方，适合政策评估
expressions.example: The policy creates a trade-off between coverage and generosity.

expressions.note: 常用于讨论段，强调结果不再能被简单概括
expressions.example: The subgroup analysis complicates the picture of uniform progress.

expressions.note: 突出解释层面的困难，适合方法和讨论部分
expressions.example: Selective attrition complicates the interpretation of cohort differences.

expressions.note: 强调多个因素交织，适合识别和机制问题
expressions.example: Residential sorting makes it difficult to disentangle school effects.

expressions.note: 强调结果或概念变得不确定，而非完全混乱
expressions.example: Multiple job spells introduce ambiguity into employment histories.

clusters.meaning: 实际情况比X更复杂/微妙

expressions.en: offer a more nuanced account of
expressions.note: 强调细化已有解释，常用于贡献表述
expressions.example: The analysis offers a more nuanced account of class reproduction.

expressions.note: 强调对强说法加限制条件，不是完全否定
expressions.example: These results qualify the claim that education equalizes opportunity.

expressions.note: 语气较温和，适合从描述过渡到解释
expressions.example: The age gradients suggest a more complex picture of adaptation.

expressions.note: 强调不能被单一逻辑解释，适合讨论异常发现
expressions.example: The rural results resist a simple interpretation based on income.

expressions.note: 直接标出悖论，适合引言中制造问题意识
expressions.example: A paradox is that mobility rose while inequality hardened.

expressions.note: 强调两个相反过程同步发生，句式更灵活
expressions.example: Women gained education at the same time that care demands intensified.

expressions.note: 强调并存而非因果，适合描述宏观矛盾
expressions.example: Greater access can coexist with sharper stratification.

expressions.en: the puzzle lies in the coexistence of
expressions.note: 更适合引出研究问题，突出悖论需要解释
expressions.example: The puzzle lies in the coexistence of expansion and exclusion.
